tests.method_name: TC-AUTH-01 | accepts a valid .com email address
TC-AUTH-02 | accepts email with dots and a plus-sign alias
TC-AUTH-03 | rejects email that is missing the @ symbol
TC-AUTH-04 | rejects email with an empty domain after @

TC-PAY-28 | rejects a string that contains letters
